message:
fix: resolve panic leak in pool, correct circular_index modulo wrapping, fix unused variable warnings

- Added HealthCheckGuard to GenericPool::acquire to prevent an active connection leak and eventual pool deadlock if a user-supplied health check panics. It now correctly decrements active count and wakes pending waiters.
- Fixed a mathematically incorrect implementation of circular_index in stealing.rs which used wrapping_add inappropriately, leading to modulo jump bugs if the start index were to somehow overflow usize. Fixed the associated test.
- Resolved unused variable warnings in recovery.rs, waker.rs, jetstream.rs, and runtime.rs by prefixing with underscore.
